creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: mi
Date: Thu Jan 22 17:31:49 UTC 2015
New revision: 377674
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/377674

Log:
  Add a patch fixing a long-standing security problem. Bump PORTREVISION.

  PR:		196351
  Differential Revision:	D1593
  Submitted by:	Jan Beich
  Security:	https://web.nvd.nist.gov/view/vuln/detail?vulnId=CVE-2012-6129

  While here, arrange for building a few of the small utilities bundled
  with library, and install them along with another potentially useful
  header-file.

  Sponsored by:	http://libpipe.com/

Changes:
  head/net/libutp/Makefile
  head/net/libutp/files/BSDmakefile
  head/net/libutp/files/BSDmakefile.utils
  head/net/libutp/files/patch-CVE-2012-6129
  head/net/libutp/pkg-descr
  head/net/libutp/pkg-plist
